HGSS.607.0000:
Past here is the Bell Tower.
This tower was built as a place of rest\r
for HO-OH, the legendary Flying-type\r
Pokémon.\f
Since HO-OH left, many people have gone
up to the tower to try to bring it back.\f
But none have succeeded in making
HO-OH appear...\f
Morty, the Gym Leader, is one who
has tried.\f
You don’t seem to have the Ecruteak
Gym Badge. If you can’t even defeat\r
Morty, going up there will be\r
a waste of time.\f
Sorry, but you’ll have to leave.
HGSS.607.0001:
Morty, the Gym Leader, ascended this
tower to try to bring back HO-OH,\r
because it no longer appears.\f
Even he couldn’t bring it back.\f
You don’t seem to have the Ecruteak
Gym Badge.\f
If you can’t even defeat Morty, going
up there will be a waste of time.\f
Sorry, but you’ll have to leave.
HGSS.607.0002:
Past here is the Bell Tower.
This tower was built as a place of rest\r
for HO-OH, the legendary Flying-type\r
Pokémon.\f
Since HO-OH left, many people have gone
up to the tower to try to bring it back.\f
But none have succeeded in making
HO-OH appear...\f
Morty, the Gym Leader, is one who
has tried.\f
I see...\r
That’s the Ecruteak Gym Badge.\f
The Badge alone will not do any good,
but I can let you through.\f
Please, do go on.\f
HGSS.607.0003:
I see...
That’s the Ecruteak Gym Badge.\f
The Badge alone will not do any good,
but I can let you through.\f
Please, do go on.\f
HGSS.607.0005:
Having been able to witness HO-OH
coming back to this tower is more than\r
worth the training I have gone through.
HGSS.607.0006:
Only those who possess the Rainbow Wing
are given permission to go up to\r
the top of the Bell Tower...\f
But the rainbow-hued Pokémon will
not come down for just anybody who\r
goes up there.\f
There must be something else you need.
I’ve heard the Kimono Girls know\r
something about it.
HGSS.607.0007:
The Johto region has two legends.\f
One is the legend about Whirl Islands.
The other is the Bell Tower legend...\f
We have been passing down the
Bell Tower legend for generations\r
in Ecruteak City.
HGSS.607.0008:
The Bell Tower shook!\f
It must be HO-OH...
HO-OH must have returned to the top!
HGSS.607.0009: Such a young one to take on HO-OH...
HGSS.607.0010:
The rainbow-hued Pokémon flying
gracefully over the tower...\f
The silvery, sparkling Pokémon resting
gently upon the whirling seabed...\f
All of this is far beyond my imagination.
